title: Official Hello Goodbye Thread
wikitext:
[]: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 18, 2017 3:41 am The previous and separate threads we had, the welcome and departures thread, were used almost interchangeably at times, so we decided to merge their functions into one. If you're new here, please introduce yourself! Tell us about yourself, and what brought you here. We're glad to have you. For those taking a break for whatever reasons (vacation, lack of internet, personal, etc), let us know so we won't worry about you! And for those leaving for good; we're sorry to see you go, but we wish you well nonetheless. Here's where you can say your goodbyes.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Aug 18, 2017 5:02 am Is that a Beatles reference? Because I read the title and now I gave Hello Goodbye stuck in my head.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 18, 2017 5:19 am Joseki wrote: Is that a Beatles reference?

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Aug 18, 2017 5:22 am I read that in Guu's voice.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Aug 24, 2017 7:31 pm Soooo, my Computer died, also life is crazy busy until start of October. So I might not make it quite that often to the forums. Thought I'd let you know. Take care, 'till October - I hope to be back in full force by then.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Thu Aug 24, 2017 10:10 pm See you, my Austrian friend! I await your full-force return. ( )

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Aug 25, 2017 3:26 am See you later, robersora. Hopefully before October.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Justacrazyguy » Fri Aug 25, 2017 10:03 am robersora wrote: Soooo, my Computer died

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Trajan » Sat Aug 26, 2017 2:19 pm I decided to visit this place again on a nostalgic whim, so I figured I'd post in here. I'm still alive (though Harvey might have something to say about that) and starting real life on September 25. Sorry to hear about NemZ, he was a good guy. May he rest in peace. I don't intend to stick around for very long, but I figured I ought to post this in order to assure any interested parties (particularly if anyone from the notorious Skype group is still around) that my departure was simply a result of getting busy with things and moving on. Hope everybody is doing well. Take care.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sat Aug 26, 2017 5:27 pm Welcome back, Trajan. Even if it's only for a short time.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by C.A.P. » Sat Aug 26, 2017 11:58 pm Trajan wrote: (particularly if anyone from the notorious Skype group is still around)

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 27, 2017 12:37 pm Harvey's been scary but all is (mostly) well in our neck of the woods, so far. It lasting until about Wednesday is stressful. I've been lurking or posting every so often, but I might properly return when Final's out (still calling it that because it's easiest ). I'm honestly still pretty sad about NemZ...I hope you all are looking after yourselves I still have my Twitter if y'all need to contact me

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Sun Aug 27, 2017 2:04 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I've been lurking or posting every so often, but I might properly return when Final's out (still calling it that because it's easiest ). I'm honestly still pretty sad about NemZ...I hope you all are looking after yourselves

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Tankred » Sun Aug 27, 2017 2:39 pm Trajan wrote: I decided to visit this place again on a nostalgic whim, so I figured I'd post in here. I'm still alive (though Harvey might have something to say about that) and starting real life on September 25. Sorry to hear about NemZ, he was a good guy. May he rest in peace. I don't intend to stick around for very long, but I figured I ought to post this in order to assure any interested parties (particularly if anyone from the notorious Skype group is still around) that my departure was simply a result of getting busy with things and moving on. Hope everybody is doing well. Take care.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Joy Evangelion » Sun Aug 27, 2017 8:41 pm robersora wrote: Soooo, my Computer died, also life is crazy busy until start of October. So I might not make it quite that often to the forums. Thought I'd let you know. Take care, 'till October - I hope to be back in full force by then.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Aug 27, 2017 9:26 pm Welcome back, SSD!

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Gus Hanson » Fri Sep 01, 2017 3:52 pm Feeling like I might leave for good this time. I know I always say that but things in my life need to go up for me in order to not feel all the time like I would rather kick the bucket sooner than when nature intends. Nothing personal against any of you, it's time for me to move on! Much love, Gus

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Sep 01, 2017 4:38 pm Later, Gus Hanson. As always we'll be here should you choose to return.

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by imprimatur13 » Fri Sep 01, 2017 4:51 pm I second. See ya! Best of luck in your life ahead!

[]: Re: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Fri Sep 01, 2017 8:08 pm Gus Hanson wrote: Feeling like I might leave for good this time. I know I always say that but things in my life need to go up for me in order to not feel all the time like I would rather kick the bucket sooner than when nature intends. Nothing personal against any of you, it's time for me to move on! Much love, Gus

[]: Official "Hello/Goodbye" Thread!             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 18, 2017 3:41 am The previous and separate threads we had, the welcome and departures thread, were used almost interchangeably at times, so we decided to merge their functions into one. If you're new here, please introduce yourself! Tell us about yourself, and what brought you here. We're glad to have you. For those taking a break for whatever reasons (vacation, lack of internet, personal, etc), let us know so we won't worry about you! And for those leaving for good; we're sorry to see you go, but we wish you well nonetheless. Here's where you can say your goodbyes.
